channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: President Ruto Announces Sh10 Diesel Price Cut and EV Adoption
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: President William Ruto has reduced diesel prices by Sh10 to ease economic pressure while pushing for the adoption of electric vehicles in Kenya.
item.content:encoded: President William Ruto has reduced diesel prices by Sh10 to ease economic pressure while pushing for the adoption of electric vehicles in Kenya.
